item.title: Economic Development Subcommittee
item.description: Economic Development Subcommittee is scheduled for June 11, 2026 at 3:30 PM at Anacapa Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: Parks & Recreation Commission Regular Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Parks & Recreation Commission Regular Meeting is scheduled for June 10, 2026 at 4:00 PM at Santa Cruz Meeting Room, 501 Poli St. Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: Rules Subcommittee
item.description: Rules Subcommittee is scheduled for June 8, 2026 at 3:00 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: Westside Community Council
item.description: Westside Community Council is scheduled for June 3, 2026 at 6:30 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Design Review Committee Meeting - Cancelled
item.description: Design Review Committee Meeting - Cancelled is scheduled for June 3, 2026 at 5:00 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: City Council Meeting Scheduled
item.description: City Council Meeting is scheduled for June 2, 2026 at 5:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for May 28, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.

item.title: College Area Community Council
item.description: College Area Community Council is scheduled for May 27, 2026 at 7:00 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Planning Commission Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Planning Commission Meeting is scheduled for May 27, 2026 at 5:30 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.
